rationale: The citing paper’s core mechanism is an “indirect ripple effect” from firm-generated content to UGC to sales, and the cited paper is explicitly about “Halo (Spillover) Effects in Social Media” and links chatter spillovers to downstream sales outcomes. Given this clear conceptual overlap on social-media spillover mechanisms (not just a generic domain mention), the pair is plausibly substantive and should be reviewed in full.
